description: This scheme was designed in response to the 2026 outbreak of Bundibugyo virus. It utilises restricted-access sequences from Pathoplexus (used with explicit author permission). The associated Pathoplexus SeqSet and DOI for these sequences can be found under the citations. For more information on data usage, please review the Pathoplexus Restricted Data Terms of Use: https://pathoplexus.org/about/terms-of-use/restricted-data
